When processing an untrusted configuration file, Commons Configuration will throw a StackOverflowError for YAML input with cycles.
This issue affects Apache Commons: from 2.2 before 2.15.0.

Users are recommended to upgrade to version 2.15.0, which fixes the issue.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00487, "percentile": 0.3852}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-337m-mw94-2v6g", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-20T15:36:43Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-337m-mw94-2v6g", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-337m-mw94-2v6g"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-45205"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-14T12:16:35Z", "published_at": "2026-05-14T12:30:27Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-45205", "https://github.com/apache/commons-configuration/pull/634", "https://lists.apache.org/thread/q3q3j10ohcqhs6o0rg1v7kz6kk27vtkk", "http://www.openwall.com/lists/oss-security/2026/05/14/5", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-337m-mw94-2v6g"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/apache/commons-configuration", "summary": "Apache Commons Configuration: StackOverflowError for YAML input with cycles", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-20T15:36:45Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-337m-mw94-2v6g", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2.15.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "org.apache.commons:commons-configuration2"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2.2, < 2.15.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
